name: auto-refresh: standards/auto-refresh-daily.sh runs on first plugin invocation each calendar day
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/auto-refresh-daily.sh" --now 2026-05-13T08:00:00Z --upstream-stub "$PWD/upstream.sh" 2>out.txt && grep "auto-refresh started" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
